Add enhanced animations and feature card illustrations

- Fix split text intro animation visibility \(z-index, perspective\)

- Implement counting animation for dashboard stat numbers

- Add smart navbar \(hide on scroll down, show on scroll up\)
- Update feature cards with illustration images
- Add lime green color to feature card numbers
- Add hero badge visibility fix

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

\)")
